seoTitle: Pimpinio vs Pine Lodge — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pimpinio and Pine Lodge. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pimpinio vs Pine Lodge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pimpinio and Pine Lodge.
heading: Pimpinio vs Pine Lodge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pimpinio, Victoria and Pine Lodge, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pimpinio has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Pine Lodge (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pimpinio or Pine Lodge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pimpinio has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Pine Lodge scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pimpinio scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Pine Lodge scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pimpinio or Pine Lodge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pimpinio has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
